title: Direct projection synthesizes IDs differently from legacy fallback
evidence: Parity audit rerun reports 0 semantic mismatches across 7 fixtures
Direct projection and GedcomBridge now share synthetic XREF generation through src/core/gschema/xref.ts
recommendedFix: Keep synthetic XREF generation centralized and treat parity audit as the gate for future read-model work.

title: Dense-tree projection performance is far above the stated threshold
evidence: projection p95 69.328 ms vs threshold 250 ms
buildDirectDocument() now skips full graph serialization on the normal path
recommendedFix: Preserve local indexing and avoid reintroducing unconditional full-graph export work in the direct projection path.

title: Dense-tree search exceeds threshold under the audited scenario
evidence: search p95 13.535 ms vs threshold 80 ms
search now uses a cached normalized index per projected document
recommendedFix: Keep search indexing document-scoped and reuse it across queries instead of renormalizing every person per search.

title: Mojibake in fastTrack regexes affects accented Spanish input matching
evidence: Accented-input fastTrack regression suite is green
fastTrack.ts no longer appears in the mojibake scan
recommendedFix: Keep accented and plain Spanish variants covered by fast-track regression tests.

title: Structured claim evidence is flattened before reaching person workspace UI
evidence: claim citations survive as event sourceRefs
evidenceGate, confidence, and structured citation review are not first-class UI surfaces
recommendedFix: Decide whether 0.5.x should expose structured claim evidence directly or explicitly defer that surface to 0.6.0.

title: Workspace profile hydration remains a two-phase load with unproven flicker risk
evidence: loadGraph applies an immediate state before async WorkspaceProfileService.load resolves
functional tests cover precedence, not visual no-flicker behavior
recommendedFix: Either collapse hydration into one committed load state or add observability/tests that prove the current two-phase load is visually acceptable.

title: Central read-model fallback still blocks the 0.6.0 hard cut
evidence: app/state flows still convert GraphDocument back into GSchemaGraph in product paths
recommendedFix: Remove the legacy fallback only after parity is fixed, then migrate remaining product flows to graph-native helpers.

title: User-facing mojibake remains in AI review and diagnostics strings
evidence: review.ts, safety.ts, and analyzer.ts still contain corrupted Spanish strings
issue is visible in UX and exported diagnostic text, but not in the fast-track runtime path
recommendedFix: Normalize affected strings and keep tooling-side mojibake repair logic untouched.
